page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: EPIB610 or HLTH720.

Formerly: HLTH720.

EPIB611 Intermediate Epidemiology (3 Credits)

Analysis of epidemiologic methods as applied to epidemiologic research, analysis of bias, confounding, effect modification issues, overview of design, implementation, and analysis of epidemiologic studies. Prerequisite: 1 course with a minimum grade of B- from (SPHL602, EPIB610); or a minimum score of 70% on the SPHL602 or EPIB610 waiver exam.
